{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320120412A9CCE3BCD85DFBBCBEB6"}"},"total":472},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7165463085434979113","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"熟悉的风格熟悉的鲤鱼！fighting！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1668339435,"group_id":"7163940081051372578","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新人作者，有自知之明在努力，接受批评会看建议，轻喷","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/zDndsI9USHZIZHfnfRIfaRk7gFmG5YRnwHl9HPrjDj","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c2b82463c63f4777b253e292f3766611~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776535079&x-signature=qJGtFN%2BFTczZEAl0TmzjZ6WshKE%3D","user_id":"2480100851582279","user_name":"笔墨诉深秋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2480100851582279","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7163940081051372578","book_info":{"abstract":"【玄幻+魏武遗风+宗门日常+苟道中人+颜值拉满+单女主】
　　白弈穿越异界衍月圣地，激活抉择系统，本想着低调发育，一路苟到无上大帝，但很快他发现事情有点不对......
　　因为长着一张颜值拉满的逆天脸庞，白弈走到哪都会被一群女帝圣女追着表白。
　　可奇怪的是，只要跟他表白过的人，都会在短时间内离奇死亡...
　　同时。
　　外界传起了谣言：只要向白弈表白，就会被他的魔尊病娇师姐杀死！
　　白弈很生气：“胡扯！师姐她不争不抢，温柔可爱，怎么可能是病娇！”
　　病娇师姐勾掉死亡名单上最后一个竞争者的名字，也认同的点点头：“小师弟说的对......”
　　本书又名：《只要我够迟钝，病娇就刀不了我》《师弟别怕！我怎么可能会是病娇呢》《直男和病娇师姐不得不说的两三事》","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o6ce5f005e446d73d5704cfcf3098595c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"颜小鲤鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7163940081051372578","book_name":"只要我足够迟钝，病娇就刀不了我","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6605人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7163947280079585825","read_count":"6605","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"245748"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"116","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,单女主,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f0b4886a1d5e16b059d3d981b24e0738~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779163452&x-signature=ADoUTpx2EJxN41qTcZjTTh%2FDLKQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"439407339906743","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.488373e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_
